description_long: This is a rectangular, two-story office building with a flat roof and a brick exterior. The facade features a series of evenly spaced, narrow vertical windows on both floors, with the lower level having smaller, square windows. One side of the building includes a small awning above a recessed entryway, suggesting the main entrance. The roof appears to be made of a gray, weathered material, likely concrete or asphalt. The building's design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on function over form. The overall appearance is typical of mid-20th-century commercial architecture found in urban environments.
description: A two-story, rectangular brick office building with a flat roof, vertical windows, and a recessed main entrance under a small awning.
description_view_0: The long side of the building is visible, showing two rows of narrow vertical windows and a small awning over the entrance at one end.
description_view_1: The short end of the building is shown, featuring two large windows on the upper floor and a row of smaller windows below, with a prominent base.
description_view_2: The opposite long side is visible, mirroring the window arrangement of the first side but without the awning or entrance.
description_view_3: The rear short end is shown, with two upper windows and two small lower windows, lacking any entrance or decorative features.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced, narrow vertical windows in two horizontal rows per long side; short sides have two upper and two lower windows, all rectangular.
